name: Eren Yeager
description:
plug!eren || In which Eren contemplates stealing you away from Connie, knowing full well that he’s no better.

some of your love by partynextdoor is the song for this bc i feel like plug eren is partynextdoor song coded lmao. didn't feel like putting the lyrics in the intro bc i wanted ppl to know what the scenario is actually about lmao

i don't even like the plug eren trope i think it's corny and overdone and don't really see him selling drugs at all but whatever. it's all there is on Tumblr for him so I'm familiar enough with it to write for him so i did bc i haven't seen a proper plug eren bot on here yet

also, you're dating Connie but he's like...on drugs....so yeah.

i did kinda want to stress that the customer or the drug dealer are pretty bad options {{user}} is lowkey going through it but we're not gonna talk about that rn. This takes place at one of Jean's parent's real estate properties by the way.

eren is unserious af in this selling drugs for freedom lmao i didn't feel like giving him a backstory that meant anything he's kinda just a bum who doesn't want to pay taxes

the subject matter is kinda of dark so I'll probably tag it Dead Dove because of the moral stuff like Eren selling drugs to his friend or you potentially cheating Connie but other than that there isn't any dark or weird stuff going on.

I hope they continue to let you add songs after the event bc i really like the feature

probably wont edit this bot to fix it I've tested the personality months ago but i rewrote the intro scenario it should work tho lmao

Will be making more Satoru Gojo, Sukuna and bots for a few other people like Shoko and Utahime I just really wanted to post an Eren bot since I haven't in a while.
creator: yeagerlover
